name: @oatda-ai/skills
description: OATDA skills for Claude Code - Unified access to 13+ LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more)
author: OATDA Team

skills.name: oatda-text-completion
skills.description: Generate text using any of OATDA's 13+ LLM providers

skills.description: Analyze images using vision-capable AI models

skills.name: oatda-generate-video
skills.description: Generate videos using AI models (MiniMax, Google Veo, Alibaba Wan)

skills.name: oatda-list-models
skills.description: List available AI models with filtering by type and provider

scripts.test: echo "Run tests with: npx tsx tests/integration/*.test.ts"
